# Copilot Workspace Notes

- Project: Finance Research Agent MVP (full-stack)
- Frontend: Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind
- Backend: FastAPI (Python)
- Data source goal: SEC EDGAR (public/free)
- Current stage: initial scaffold with mock endpoints

Implementation checklist:
- [x] Scaffold frontend and backend structure
- [x] Add local Docker Compose for frontend/backend/postgres
- [x] Add placeholder routes for ingestion, analysis jobs, and reports
- [x] Replace mock logic with real SEC ingestion pipeline
- [x] Add persistence layer for filings/chunks/jobs/reports
- [x] Add evaluation harness for citation correctness
